publicTypePackages.reason: the analyzer's contract is ts.Program-shaped: consumers hand us programs and receive diagnostics about TypeScript projects.
the engine API is Effect-native by design; Effect types are the resource-safety contract, not an implementation leak.
ambient node lib types ride along with any fs/path-adjacent public signature; the package targets node >=20 explicitly.

sharedFolderNames.reason: the analyzer is this package's shared kernel: server, proxy, and CLI are alternative delivery surfaces over one analysis core.

facadeFiles.reason: deliberate program-construction facade: the three delivery surfaces need createProgram/programHealth without the full project barrel.
deliberate engine facade: registry and lsp-server consume the engine contract directly; an index.ts would be a pass-through.
